title: Death Counter
description: DeathCounter: A lightweight plugin that tracks player deaths. Perfect for Survival, SMP servers.
body:
![DeathCounter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfe7be0fb0d7c44cc72e2cdd7e68e9c3ae91b9b8.png)

DeathCounter keeps a per-player death amount, shows it in chat, optional tab list and sidebar scoreboard and can broadcast a server-wide leaderboard on a timer. --- ## 🚀 Features - ⚡ Lightweight & simple - 🔢 Tracks every death automatically - 🏆 Leaderboard in chat (`/deaths leaderboard`) - 🔄 Admin reset: one player or all deaths - 📋 Optional *ab list suffix and personal sidebar scoreboard entries - 💬 Optional custom death message (or leave vanilla messaging) - 📦 **[PlaceholderAPI](https://github.com/PlaceholderAPI/PlaceholderAPI)** - ✅ Runs on Bukkit / Spigot / Paper / Purpur / Folia --- ## 💬 Commands - `/deaths` → Your own death count - `/deaths ` → Another player’s death count - `/deaths leaderboard` → Show the leaderboard once in chat - `/deaths leaderboard show` → Show the **right-scoreboard** DeathCounter top list again *(personal)* - `/deaths leaderboard hide` → Hide that **right-scoreboard** top list *(personal; tab list unaffected)* - `/deaths reset ` *(permission)* → Reset that player’s deaths - `/deaths reset all` *(permission)* → Reset **everyone’s** deaths Alias: **`/deathcounter`** (same command) --- ## 🔐 Permissions - `deathcounter.use` *(default: true)* - `deathcounter.others` *(default: true)* - `deathcounter.leaderboard` *(default: true)* - `deathcounter.reset` *(default: op)* - `deathcounter.resetall` *(default: op)* --- ## 📊 Metrics ![bStats chart](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/DeathCount.svg) --- ## 🛠️ Compatibility - Minecraft: Java Edition, **1.8 → 26.1.2** - Platforms: **Bukkit**, **Spigot**, **Paper**, **Purpur**, **Folia** - Java: **8+** --- ### 💙 Perfect for: Survival • SMP • Events • Streamer-friendly servers
